title: Granicus Runner Environment Contract
description: Defines environment variables passed from Go runners to Python/Shell subprocesses.

GRANICUS_ASSET_NAME.description: Name of the asset being executed.

GRANICUS_RUN_ID.description: Unique identifier for this pipeline run.

GRANICUS_PROJECT_ROOT.description: Absolute path to the pipeline project root directory.

GRANICUS_METADATA_PATH.description: Path to the temp JSON file where the subprocess writes metadata back to Go.

GRANICUS_INTERVAL_START.description: ISO 8601 datetime marking the start of the execution interval. Present only for scheduled runs.

GRANICUS_INTERVAL_END.description: ISO 8601 datetime marking the end of the execution interval. Present only for scheduled runs.

GRANICUS_DEST_RESOURCE.description: JSON-encoded destination resource object. Must parse to a valid connection shape.

GRANICUS_SOURCE_RESOURCE.description: JSON-encoded source resource object. Must parse to a valid connection shape.

GRANICUS_REFS.description: JSON-encoded map of dependency name to resolved BigQuery table reference (project.dataset.table).

name.description: Connection name as defined in pipeline.yaml.

type.description: Connection backend type (e.g. bigquery, postgres, gcs).

credentials.description: Path to service account JSON credentials file.

additionalProperties.description: Additional connection properties passed through from pipeline config.

refs.description: Map of dependency asset name to fully-qualified BigQuery table reference.

metadata_file.description: Shape of the JSON file written by the subprocess back to Go at GRANICUS_METADATA_PATH.
